---
title: "Project Checkpoint 0"
---

1.  Rank dataset preferences
2.  State if there are people that you would trade your dataset preference to work with
3.  If you had to choose one **favorite** topic from 331 what would it be?

-   viz
-   cleaning data
-   writing functions
-   iterating over functions
-   statistical analyses

4.  If you had to choose one **least favorite** topic from 331 what would it be?

-   viz
-   cleaning data
-   writing functions
-   iterating over functions
-   statistical analyses
